tasks.title: Configure Resend before any live resend / reminder batch
tasks.detail: 180 Reminder 1 and initial sends are queued but live delivery is blocked until RESEND_API_KEY + DIRECT_DEPOSIT_EMAIL_MODE=resend + SRS_RECRUITING_FROM_EMAIL.

tasks.title: Send Reminder 1 cohort (after mail GO)
tasks.detail: Zero-write dry-run already sized this batch. Execute only after P251/P250 GO with --live --confirm-live.
tasks.command: npx tsx scripts/p248-run-resend-live-reminder-campaign.ts  # after mail config + explicit approval

tasks.title: Retry eligible initial paperwork send
tasks.detail: 1 open-store eligible packet. Production Dropbox quota may still be 0 — keep DROPBOX_SIGN_TEST_MODE intentional until quota restored.
tasks.command: npx tsx scripts/p243-run-open-store-bulk-paperwork-queue.ts  # dry-run first; live only after flags + approval

tasks.title: Reconcile packets missing signatureRequestId
tasks.detail: Cannot remind without Dropbox signature request id — reconcile store or resend initial packet.

tasks.title: Clean invalid emails in Breezy / workflow
tasks.detail: Excluded from reminders until addresses are fixed in Breezy.

tasks.title: Apply safe status corrections when authorized
tasks.detail: Do not enable P246 --apply-safe-corrections until operator reviews reconciliation conflicts.
tasks.command: npx tsx scripts/p246-run-outstanding-paperwork-reminders.ts  # preview only until authorized

tasks.title: Review duplicate candidate detections from dry-run
tasks.detail: Dry-run detected duplicates; confirm idempotency keys / store hygiene before live reminder batch.

tasks.title: Advance Ready-for-MEL candidates (no MEL writes from this mission)
tasks.detail: Candidates classified ready for MEL verification — recruiter review only; P251 does not write MEL.
